content:
# Signed: Your Name + model-version, 2023-12-01
# Format: MurphySig v0.3.3 (https://murphysig.dev/spec)
#
# Context: A Python function to slugify a given text, likely for use in a web application or content management system.
#
# Confidence: 0.9 - The regular expression used may not cover all edge cases for non-English characters.
# Open: How to handle non-ASCII characters that are not necessarily part of a non-English language.

def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    """Convert a string to a URL-safe slug."""
    import re
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r"[^a-z0-9]+", "-", text)
    text = text.strip("-")
    return text
